data.title: Global-e Online sets $200M share repurchase plan
data.description:
• Global-e Online (NASDAQ:GLBE) board of directors has authorized a program to repurchase the company's ordinary shares in an amount up to $200 million.
  • The company expects to fund repurchases with cash on hand and future cash generated from its operations.
  • GLBE +1.46% premarket to $33.99
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Impinj announces upsize and pricing of offering of $170M of 0% convertible senior notes due 2029
data.description:
• Impinj (NASDAQ:PI) on Thursday announced the pricing of $170 million aggregate principal amount of 0% Convertible Senior Notes due 2029 in a private offering.
  • The aggregate principal amount of the offering was increased from the previously announced offering size of $150 million.
  • The sale of the notes is expected to settle on September 8.
  • Impinj estimates that the net proceeds from the offering will be approximately $164.2 million.
  • The notes will be senior, unsecured obligations of Impinj. The notes will not bear regular interest and the principal amount of the notes will not accrete.
  • The notes will mature on September 15, 2029, unless earlier redeemed, repurchased, or converted.
  • Impinj may not redeem the notes prior to March 20, 2028.
  • The notes will be convertible at an initial conversion rate of 3.7398 shares of Impinj’s common stock per $1,000 principal amount of notes.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Branded Legacy acquires GMP facility in Vancouver
data.description:
• Branded Legacy (OTCPK:BLEG) on Thursday said its subsidiary, BioLegacy Evaluative Group, has acquired a 22,000-square-foot commercial property in Vancouver, Canada.
  • "This strategic acquisition establishes a cutting-edge laboratory and manufacturing facility, fully compliant with Good Manufacturing Practices (GMP), positioning BioLegacy at the forefront of developing life-saving technologies to address the escalating opioid crisis," the company said.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: AIML announces $1.55 million private placement
data.description:
• AIML Innovations announced on Wednesday that it intends to complete a non-brokered private placement offering of up to 31million units at $0.05 per unit for gross proceeds of up to $1.55 million.
  • Each unit consists of one common share and one warrant, which will be exercisable into one common share of the company.
  • Each warrant will have a term of five years and will entitle the holder to purchase one common share at a price of $0.15 per common share following the closing date.
  • The company intends to use net proceeds for working capital requirements.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: AITX extends no reverse stock split pledge through 2026
data.description:
• Artificial Intelligence Technology Solutions (OTCPK:AITX) has extended its no reverse stock split commitment through the end of 2026, marking the fifth consecutive extension.
  • Exceptions apply only if the company pursues an uplisting to NASDAQ or OTCQB and does not meet minimum price requirements.
  • Source: Press release

data.title: 4 stocks to watch on Thursday: SOFI, GTLB, TROW, HPE
data.description:
Stock index futures were steady on Thursday, a day after Nasdaq and S&P 500 rallied, helped by a boost from Alphabet shares, while investors digested more labor data. Here are four stocks to keep an eye on: 

SoFi Technologies (SOFI) shares were up 0.5% in premarket trade as it re-entered the exchange-traded fund market Wednesday with its first launch since 2023, rolling out the SoFi Agentic AI ETF. AGIQ is listed on NYSE Arca and can be purchased through SoFi Invest and other brokerage platforms.

GitLab (GTLB) was down 5.5% in extended trading after a weaker-than-expected sales outlook for the third quarter, a conservative revenue guide for the full year, and a sudden CFO exit rattled investors. For Q3, the company expects adjusted diluted earnings per share in the range of $0.19 to $0.20 on revenue of $238M to $239M. That compared with analysts' estimates for earnings of $0.19 a share on revenue of $241.53M.

T. Rowe Price (TROW) rose 7.9% before the opening bell after Goldman Sachs (NYSE:GS) said it plans to acquire up to $1B in T. Rowe Price (TROW) common stock, equaling a stake of up to 3.5%, as part of a collaboration agreement. The alliance will focus on offering public and private market investment products for retirement and wealth investors.

Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) was up 4.5% in premarket trade as the firm reported its third-quarter financial results, which surpassed estimates in its first earnings report since the acquisition of Juniper Networks. The company reported adjusted earnings per share of $0.44 versus the consensus estimate of $0.42.

data.title: Toro reports mixed Q3 results; updates FY outlook range
data.description:
• Toro press release (NYSE:TTC): Q3 Non-GAAP EPS of $1.24 beats by $0.02.
  • Revenue of $1.13B (-2.6% Y/Y) misses by $30M.
  • Full-year fiscal 2025 net sales and earnings per share guidance remain within previously communicated ranges.
  • For fiscal 2025, management expects total company net sales and adjusted diluted earnings per share to both be at the lower end of prior guidance ranges: net sales flat to down 3% and *adjusted diluted earnings per share of about $4.15.
  • FY revenue consensus estimated growth of -1.13% Y/Y; adjusted diluted earnings per share consensus of $4.25.

data.title: Sunoco launches $1.7B senior notes, $1B preferred offering to fund Parkland acquisition
data.description:
• Sunoco LP (NYSE:SUN) has announced two major private offerings to support its planned acquisition of Parkland Corporation.
  • The offerings include: $850M in senior notes due 2031, $850M in senior notes due 2034, and $1B in Series A Preferred Units (1M units at $1,000 each).
  • Proceeds from both offerings will help fund cash consideration and transaction costs related to the Parkland acquisition.
  • Prior to closing, funds may be used to temporarily reduce borrowings under Sunoco’s revolving credit facility.
  • None of the offerings are contingent on one another or on the completion of the Parkland deal.
  • If the Parkland acquisition is not completed by May 5, 2026, or is canceled, both the notes and preferred units will be subject to special mandatory redemption.
  • Notes will be redeemed at 100% of issue price + accrued interest.
  • Preferred units will be redeemed at $1,000 + unpaid distributions, if any.
  • Source: Press release, +1

data.title: BitFuFu expands bitcoin reserves to 1,899 BTC in August
data.description:
• BitFuFu (NASDAQ:FUFU) held 1,899 BTC in August, an increase of 115 BTC from July 31, including the purchase of 48 BTC and a net inflow of 12 BTC from customer payments.
  • Bitcoin production: 408 BTC, a 12.6% month-over-month decrease, including 353 BTC from cloud mining and 55 BTC from self-mining.
  • Self-owned hashrate grew 31.6% month-over-month to 5.0 EH/s, out of a total 35.6 EH/s under management, BitFuFu (NASDAQ:FUFU) said.
  • Average fleet efficiency improved to 17.5 J/TH.

data.title: TOYO acquires VSUN brand to drive strategic growth
data.description:
• TOYO (NASDAQ:TOYO) has acquired the VSUN brand from its sister company, Vietnam Sunergy Joint Stock Company ("VSUN Co"), a solar module provider.
  • The acquisition of VSUN brand did not involve any issuance of new equity by TOYO.
  • TOYO -0.16% premarket to $6.17.
  • Source: Press Release
